top_signals.title: Silver could fall further after latest slump, analysts say as they warn of demand destruction
top_signals.summary: Silver's rally of over 140% last year is deterring buyers in various industries and its elevated price levels are beginning to weigh on demand, UBS said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran and the Forever War Trap
top_signals.summary: In trying to avoid a quagmire in Iran, America found a dead end.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Army receives first lightweight Javelin launchers
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Army has received its first batch of new, lighter Javelin launchers, defense contractor RTX announced in a statement Tuesday.

top_signals.title: Crypto card monthly transaction volume surges 230% from 2025
top_signals.summary: Payment volume on crypto-linked credit and debit cards has been steadily increasing since 2024, reaching about $7.8 billion in cumulative transactions this month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Commission proposes new authorisation for mobile satellite services for EU's resilience and competitiveness
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 27 May 2026 The European Commission adopted a proposal for the selection of mobile satellite services (MSS) providers who will be authorised to use the harmonised 2 GHz frequency band beyond 2027, when the current licenses expire.

top_signals.title: SL Green partners with Japan’s Mori to build NYC office tower
top_signals.summary: The new 46-story building will be close to One Vanderbilt, SL Green's prized skyscraper that has commanded some of the highest office rents in New York.

top_signals.title: The Right Way for Europe to Spend More on Defense
top_signals.summary: America should cofinance the continent’s rearmament.
